tldr_key_stats: Base ATK from weapon only · ER 200%+ · HP for healing · Q > E >>> NA
intro: Bennett is the single best support character in Genshin Impact. His Elemental Burst provides a massive ATK buff based on his base ATK (character + weapon only — artifacts do NOT count), while healing anyone below 70% HP. He fits into virtually every team as a healer, buffer, and Pyro enabler. At C1, his ATK buff has no HP restriction, making him the undisputed king of supports since version 1.0.
weapon_bottom_line: Highest base ATK sword you own. Aquila Favonia (674 ATK) is BiS. Sapwood Blade (565 ATK, forgeable) is the best free option. The ATK buff only scales with BASE ATK — weapon ATK matters, artifact ATK% does nothing.

weapons.name: Aquila Favonia
weapons.notes: Highest base ATK sword. The Physical DMG substat is wasted on Bennett but the 674 ATK makes it BiS for buffing. Only pull if you get it from standard banner.

weapons.name: Mistsplitter Reforged
weapons.notes: Same 674 base ATK as Aquila. CRIT DMG substat actually useful if you run DPS Bennett. Better than Aquila for overall value.

weapons.name: Sapwood Blade R5
weapons.notes: Best F2P option — free forgeable from Sumeru. 565 base ATK is the highest among 4-star swords. ER substat helps meet his energy needs. The leaf gives EM to the team.

weapons.name: Skyward Blade
weapons.notes: Good balance of base ATK and ER. Makes building Bennett trivial. Standard banner weapon.

weapons.name: Favonius Sword
weapons.notes: Low base ATK but massive ER + team battery. Use only if you cannot meet 200% ER otherwise. Sacrifices buff strength for consistency.

artifact_why: Noblesse Oblige gives +20% ATK to the entire team when Bennett uses his Burst — stacking perfectly with his own ATK buff. There is no better support set for him.
artifact_alt: 4pc Instructor (budget/beginner option — +120 EM for reaction teams). 2pc Emblem + 2pc Tenacity (if desperate for ER and HP).

main_stats.sands_note: ER% until 200%+ ER. Switch to HP% once ER requirements are met.
main_stats.goblet_note: Always HP%. Bennett's personal damage is secondary to his buff and healing.
main_stats.circlet_note: Healing Bonus for maximum healing (recommended). HP% if you don't have a Healing Bonus circlet.

sub_priority: 1. Energy Recharge — until 200%+. Non-negotiable. Burst must be available every rotation.
2. HP% — more healing per tick. Bennett heals fast, but more HP = more comfortable.
3. Flat HP — minor boost to healing.
4. CRIT Rate/DMG — only for DPS Bennett builds (not recommended for support).

teams.name: Team 1: Raiden National
teams.desc: The timeless meta team. Bennett buffs Xiangling and Raiden simultaneously. Xiangling snapshots Bennett's ATK buff on her Pyronado. Raiden recharges the entire team. Consistent, high single-target and AoE damage.

teams.name: Team 2: International
teams.desc: Devastating AoE team. Bennett buffs Xiangling, Kazuha double-swirls Pyro and Hydro. Childe enables Xiangling to vape every hit. High skill ceiling, higher damage ceiling.

teams.name: Team 3: Ganyu Melt
teams.desc: Bennett enables Pyro application for Ganyu's charged shot melts. Shield from Zhongli prevents interruption. Bennett's buff snapshots onto Xiangling's Pyronado for consistent Pyro uptime.

teams.name: Team 4: Universal Flex Slot
teams.members: Any Main DPS + Any Sub DPS + Any Support + Bennett
teams.desc: Bennett fits into virtually every team. ATK-scaling DPS characters benefit most. Notable: Wanderer, Yoimiya, Navia, Lyney all love Bennett's buff.

rotation_code: Raiden E → Xingqiu E Q E → Bennett Q E → Xiangling Q E → Raiden Q → N3C combos → Repeat
rotation_key: Key: Bennett Q BEFORE Xiangling Q — her Pyronado snapshots the ATK buff for its entire duration. Also, Bennett's E inside his Q generates Pyro particles that funnel to Xiangling. C1 Bennett removes the HP requirement for his ATK buff.
mistakes: Building ATK% artifacts. Bennett's buff scales ONLY with base ATK (character level + weapon ATK). ATK% from artifacts does NOTHING for his buff. Only weapon base ATK matters.
Too little ER. Bennett needs 200%+ ER in most teams. Below 180%, his burst won't be ready. Use ER sands if needed — a weaker buff that's always available beats a stronger buff that's never ready.
Leveling Normal Attacks. Bennett almost never uses normal attacks. Save the talent books for his Burst and Skill.

C6 without thinking. Bennett's C6 infuses melee characters with Pyro — this RUINS physical DPS (Eula, Razor) and overrides some elemental infusions (Keqing, Ayaka). Only activate C6 if you're sure your teams want it.
Using Bennett with HP-scaling DPS. Characters like Neuvillette, Yelan, and Furina scale with HP, not ATK. Bennett's ATK buff is wasted on them. Use different supports.

seo.title: Bennett Build Guide — Best Weapons, Artifacts, Teams | GenshinGuide
seo.description: Complete Bennett build guide for Genshin Impact v4.8. Best weapons ranked (Aquila Favonia, Sapwood Blade), optimal artifacts (Noblesse Oblige), best teams (National, International), and rotation guide.
